# Lukas Bifurson

An old strategist whose wisdom was forged both in war and along the paths he has walked.

> **Ancestry:** Infernis
> **Community:** Orderborne
> **Role:** Warden

## Features

**Prepared (3):** This card begins with **3 tokens** and cannot gain additional tokens until the next rest.

**Veteran Orders:** **Spend 1 token** for _Lukas_ to grant one of the following options. Each option can only be chosen once.

- An ally makes an attack with advantage.

- An ally clears 1 Stress.

- An ally adds 1d8 to a damage roll.

> **Design notes:** This Ally is essentially a _Strategic Approach_ (Level 2 Bone Ability), but with slightly more restrictions.
